ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower produced by the engine */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time taken to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "make" TEXT /* Vehicle manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Vehicle model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Model year */,
  "class" TEXT /* Vehicle class (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Transmission type (e.g., automatic, manual, semi-automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specs" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle associated with this engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, V8) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "camshaft_type" TEXT /* Type of camshaft used (e.g., SOHC, DOHC) */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "engine_management_system" TEXT /* Engine management system used (e.g., fuel injection, carburetor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance test */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Track name where the test was conducted */,
  "lap_time" REAL /* Lap time in seconds during the performance test */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed achieved during the test */,
  "zero_to_sixty" REAL /* Time taken to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "quarter_mile_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete a quarter mile */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 mph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency report */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle associated with this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "average_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon calculated */,
  "cost_per_mile" REAL /* Cost per mile based on fuel prices */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "driving_conditions" TEXT /* Driving conditions (e.g., city, highway, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_reports_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Research, Development, Sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data viewed by the user (e.g., performance metrics, fuel efficiency reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being insured */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "premium" REAL /* Annual insurance premium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_insurance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of the registration */,
  "license_plate_number" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_registrations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "vehicle_id" TEXT /* Reference to the vehicle being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
